additionalFields.headline: Amazon EC2 M9g and M9gd instances powered by AWS Graviton5 are now available
additionalFields.postBody: Starting today, Amazon EC2 M9g and M9gd general purpose instances powered by AWS Graviton5 processors are generally available.

additionalFields.headline: AWS Nitro System enhancements for Graviton-based instances
additionalFields.postBody: The AWS Nitro System now offers improved networking for Graviton-based instances.
